name: 26-invalid-component-missing-in-cdx
description: Sidecar declares bom-ref `pkg:pypi/mcp-server-git@0.5.0` but the companion CDX lists only `pkg:npm/@modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem@2.3.1`. Cross-file defect: every sidecar component bom-ref must correspond to a CDX component bom-ref per schema-rule.
notes: This closes the sidecar↔CDX binding. Without the check, a malicious or buggy emitter could attach AIBOM evidence to a component identity the CDX never vouched for — effectively injecting unprovenanced capability claims.
